title: Line 31800 – Disability amount transferred from a dependant, for someone who died - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 31800 – Disability amount transferred from a dependant, for someone who died
- Return type: Personal income tax and benefit return
If the deceased had a dependant who is eligible for the disability tax credit, you may be able to claim all or a part of the dependant's disability amount.
For more information, see line 31800 and complete the chart for line 31800 on the Federal Worksheet .

## Forms and publications
- Federal income tax and benefit information
- Guide RC4064, Disability-Related Information
- Form T2201, Disability Tax Credit Certificate
- Tax credits and deductions for persons with disabilities
